data.title: Bedrock will distribute BABY airdrops to users who bind their Babylon wallets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bedrock will distribute BABY airdrops to users who bind their Babylon wallets. Users need to bind a valid BABY wallet before 11 am (UTC) on April 10 to participate in the first round of airdrops. Users who have not bound their wallets can bind their BABY wallets before May 10. The distribution date is from April 14 to May 30, and there is no gas fee for receiving.

data.title: BTC fell below 81,000 USDT, and the 24-hour increase narrowed to 5.2%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC fell below 81,000 USDT and is now at 80,986 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 5.2%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes opened lower, with the Nasdaq falling 2.8%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that the three major stock indexes opened lower at the opening of the US stock market, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average down 1.7%, the S&P 500 down 2.1%, and the Nasdaq down 2.8%; the US CPI in March was far below expectations. Most technology stocks fell, with Apple (AAPL.O) down about 5% and Tesla (TSLA.O) down 4.5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: After REMUS was listed on Bitget Onchain, the highest increase reached 1400%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) recently launched projects showing an upward trend. Among them, REMUS has the highest increase of 1,400% after its launch, RFC has reached 635%, and AGAWA has reached 245%.
Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade hot assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Binance will airdrop 490 PROMPT tokens to users who have traded on the Alpha platform
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance announced that all users who have traded on the Alpha platform will receive an airdrop of 490 PROMPT. Eligible users will receive these tokens in their Alpha wallets before 13:10 (UTC) on April 10, 2025.
Participation qualification: Only users who have traded on the Alpha platform using the spot or funding account of the Binance trading platform before 00:00 (UTC) on April 10, 2025.

data.title: $DOG Successfully Bridged from Solana to Cardano
data.description:
There is big news for memecoin traders. $DOG, the memecoin with nearly 100,000 holders and a $120M+ market cap, is now officially live on Cardano. And it’s all thanks to Wanchain, the bridge making this move possible
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/bitcoin-and-crypto-guide/dog-successfully-bridged-from-solana-to-cardano/

data.title: sUSD Depegs Again, Undermining Stablecoin Confidence in Synthetix
data.description:
TL;DR Synthetix’s sUSD stablecoin briefly fell to $0. 83, its lowest level in five years, sparking renewed concerns about its long-term stability. While it shares design similarities with Terra’s failed UST, sUSD is backed by a $30 million treasury that could help mitigate extreme risks. The Synthetix team says new mechanisms are being introduced to restore. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/susd-depegs-again-undermining-stablecoin-confidence-in-synthetix/

data.title: ZKFair L1 Bridge Funds Transferred to Suspicious Addresses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, SlowMist founder Yu Jian has reported suspicious activity involving over $6 million from the ZKFair L1 Bridge. On March 27, these funds were moved to a Safe multi-signature address controlled by the admin, and subsequently transferred to an externally owned account (EOA). A significant portion of the funds was then staked on Aave. The EOA address is identified as one of the owners of the ZKFair Safe multi-signature account, raising concerns about the legitimacy of these transactions.

data.title: Cosine: More than 6 million US dollars of funds on ZKFair L1 Bridge were deposited into Aave for pledge, and the project's behavior is suspicious
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of SlowMist founder Yu Xian, more than 6 million US dollars worth of funds on ZKFair L1 Bridge were transferred to the Safe multi-signature address with its admin permissions on March 27, and then transferred to an EOA address, most of which entered Aave staking, which is suspicious. The EOA address is one of the owners of the ZKFair Safe multi-signature.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches PROMPT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official interface, Binance Alpha has launched PROMPT.
